{{Infobox character
| name = Eithan
| aliases = Eithan Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord, heir to the Arelius family
| abilities = Enforcer technique, Enforcer binding, breathing technique, Soulsmithing
| affiliations = Blackflame Empire, Arelius family
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Identity:''' later revealed to be [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], the ancient Soulsmith he once was.}}

''See also: [[Eithan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Eithan Arelius, also known by his full name [[Ozmanthus]] [[Tiberian]] Mereithan Arelius, is a prominent and highly skilled [[Underlord]] belonging to the ancient [[House Arelius]]. A member of the [[Blackflame Empire]], he has served as an advisor to the [[Monarch Tiberian Arelius]] and is recognized for his immense talent, having reached the [[Underlord]] stage at a remarkably young age. Eithan is characterized by his eccentric, cheery, and often playful personality, frequently masking his true power and intentions behind a sunny disposition or acting like an idle, carefree individual. Despite this outward demeanor, he possesses extraordinary observational capabilities and spiritual perception, often described as having a thousand eyes and ten thousand ears, which allows him to sense movements and details that others cannot. His bloodline legacy grants him a unique form of perception that functions through physical senses rather than standard spiritual detection. Throughout his [[life]], Eithan has acted as a mentor and protector to several individuals, including [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], whom he has brought under his aegis. His influence extends across the continent, involving him in imperial affairs and high-stakes conflicts, with some legends even referring to him as the [[Reaper of Worlds]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Eithan Arelius, a blond [[sacred artist]] and heir to the [[Arelius family]], arrived wearing expensive white shadesilk from the west. Utilizing [[Enforcer techniques]] to drift to the ground and launch himself, he used webs of power to gather information while wielding wrought iron fabric scissors as a weapon. This [[Underlord]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]], whose clan organizes street sweepers in the capital, possesses a power inherited from his father's line and superior awareness that allows him to see the present. While searching for promising recruits, he assisted [[Lindon]] and observed his transition to [[Iron]], even noting that the man's throat was not as badly injured as he had initially believed. Ultimately, Eithan considers [[Lindon]] to be a gamble.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] has blond hair.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]] to drift slowly to the ground.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]]'s clothes are expensive white shadesilk imported from the west.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] uses webs of his power to gather information.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] uses an [[Enforcer binding]] to launch himself.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] possesses a power inherited from his father's line.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] drinks a liquid that tastes like distilled poison.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] refers to [[Lindon]] as 'elder brother'.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] claims he can see the present.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] possesses superior awareness that allows him to know everything within range of his spirit.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] wears white-and-blue robes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is from the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]]'s clan organizes street sweepers in [[Blackflame City]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] gave the marble a curious glance.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] possesses thousand eyes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is looking for promising recruits.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] can tear metal with his bare hands.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] can approach without being felt due to a collar's effect.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] uses wrought iron fabric scissors as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]]'s breathing technique almost killed [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is a yellow-haired man who has helped [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is pleased with [[Lindon]]'s answer.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] stared at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] noted that [[Lindon]]'s throat was not as far gone as he had previously thought.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] observed [[Lindon]]'s transition to [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is a yellow-haired man.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] sits on a step and fiddles with his thumbs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is an [[Underlord]] in service of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] is the heir to the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] Arelius reached the stage of [[Underlord]] at a young age.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] Arelius is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] considers [[Lindon]] a gamble.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Eithan Arelius, the youngest [[Underlord]] in the [[Empire]] and the eleventh strongest active [[Lord]], is an adopted brother to [[Lindon]] who has provided him with various instructions and training. Clad in a teal outer robe embroidered with golden fish, he carries a lantern containing a burning star and utilizes an [[Arelius bloodline legacy]] that includes a spectral gray mass of [[soulfire]]. Throughout his time in [[Blackflame City]], he has acted as a teacher to [[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]], teaching the latter cycling techniques and [[Soulsmithing]] while monitoring his progress. Eithan has utilized a detection web, scissors as a weapon, and the [[Hollow Armor]] technique to navigate various crises. After opening a temple on a mountain and leaving [[Cassias]] in charge, he eventually returned to the city where his massive depth of [[madra]] and extraordinary senses were unveiled.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is a person who will take [[Lindon]] away.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius is an [[Underlord]] who gave [[Lindon]] instructions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] once locked [[Lindon]] in a stone ruin alone for two weeks.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius took [[Lindon]] in.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] wears a teal outer robe embroidered with golden fish.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] grew up on a training course similar to the one described.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] carries a lantern containing a burning star.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is facing a crisis.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] instructs [[Lindon]] to bring his second core up to [[Iron]] and brush up on his [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] allowed Gesha and [[Lindon]] to look at the [[scripts]] and constructs of the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] can fill all four crystals in seconds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] notes that all cycling methods have tradeoffs.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] advises [[Lindon]] to avoid wearing his ring while practicing the technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]]'s word as an [[Underlord]] convinced families to allow [[Cassias]] and [[Jing]]'s marriage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has high standards.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is considered the eleventh strongest of the Underlords.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is showing [[Lindon]] different [[Paths]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is [[Lindon]]'s adopted brother.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] spent most of his childhood in [[Blackflame City]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is a friend of [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has adopted [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has a spectral gray mass of [[soulfire]] hovering in his spirit above his core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] can find more [[soulfire]] fuel due to his bloodline's sense.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]]'s actions might have done [[Eithan]] Arelius a favor.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is a teacher to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] uses scissors as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has a detection web.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has placed winning bets before.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius stumbled through a portal to the other side of the world six years ago.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] beamed at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] said he could have directed more soldiers to stop [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] suggested that cracking open her master's [[Remnant]] was the fastest way to [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] opened a temple at the top of a mountain four months ago.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Cassias]] gave up his position in the [[Arelius family]] to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has been monitoring [[Lindon]] as promised.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] allotted [[Lindon]] six weeks for the [[Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] left [[Cassias]] in charge.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has returned to the city.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius has disciples challenging the [[Blackflame Trials]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Hollow Armor]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has [[Copper sight]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has an [[Arelius bloodline legacy]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has two students.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] taught [[Lindon]] a cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is not in the city of [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius is the youngest [[Underlord]] in the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is a character who uses a broom.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is an [[Underlord]] whose power was unveiled.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is ranked eleventh among active [[Lords]] in the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has extraordinary senses.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has a massive depth of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius held scissors against [[Jai Daishou]]'s throat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] Arelius was gone.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] claims to have killed an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Eithan Arelius, a second-ranked [[Underlord]] and Patriarch of a great family, masks his power by wrapping his core in a [[veil]]. While traveling to the capital on a private cloudship as a temporary [[Skysworn]] officer, he engages in combat against emissaries and Underlords, notably serving as the primary target for the [[Skysworn Underlord]]'s technique. During these conflicts, he releases pulses of [[pure madra]] and utilizes black scissors, a white knife, and [[Striker techniques]]. Throughout his journey, he provides training for [[Yerin]], offers instruction to [[Lindon]], and hints at methods regarding [[Truegold]] advancement and the removal of a parasite. Ultimately, he is recalled to a secret location by order of [[the Emperor]] while maintaining his belief that the strong write the rules.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a person whose handwriting was found in the [[Deepwalker Ape]]'s prison.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] wraps his core in a [[veil]] to mask his power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a person the narrator has felt rage against.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] Arelius has a tiny blue spirit on his head.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] painted a picture of a tall, lonely mountain with a flat summit and an ancient stone building.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] told [[Lindon]] that he does not have a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] uses black scissors.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] was the primary target of the [[Skysworn Underlord]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|In [[Lindon]]'s [[spiritual sight]], [[Eithan]] glowed in a sun of green wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] released a pulse of [[pure madra]] from his chest.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is the second-ranked [[Underlord]] on these shores.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] used [[pure madra]] from his fist to strike [[Naru Gwei]] in the chest.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is a character who emits a wave of mostly colorless and blue-white madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] entered the room holding a pure white knife.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] states that the timing of an event depends on whether a [[Dreadgod]] is coming to kill everyone.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is located below the house.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is wounded by a red hook in his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] uses a [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] sealed [[Yerin's belt]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] might know a way to make someone a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is currently fighting Underlords and emissaries.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] has been recalled to a secret location by order of [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] can generate three or four top-grade scales a day.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] was traveling to the capital on a private cloudship.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is a temporary [[Skysworn]] officer.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is an [[Underlord]] and the Patriarch of a great family.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] has hinted at a way to remove the parasite from [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] Arelius taught [[Lindon]] something.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is at a fortress of death.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] trained [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] is [[Cassias]]'s [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] saw the [[Blood Shadow]] as an opportunity for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] believes the strong write the rules.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] touched [[Yerin]] with a marble.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|While acting on behalf of [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]], Eithan provides [[Lindon]] with protection through his name and a [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]]. After spending weeks contemplating a new idea, he leads [[Lindon]] to a [[Bloodforged Iron body]] while warning him that others might attempt to kill him to steal his cycling technique. Eithan, who carries a blue waxed fabric umbrella that he uses as a weapon, intends to deal with [[Redmoon Hall]] and is the only individual to inquire about [[Renfei]]'s death. Utilizing [[soulfire]] to reinforce his constructs, he remains an elusive figure that even [[Yerin]] cannot catch up to. Ultimately, Eithan is expected at [[the Emperor]]'s audience hall after remarking that everything ends.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]]'s name provides a level of protection for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] has been toying with an idea for the last few weeks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] is the only person who would ask questions about [[Renfei]]'s death.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] intends to deal with [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] talks about tiger-chasing.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] thanked [[Eithan]] for the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] led [[Lindon]] to the [[Bloodforged Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] warned [[Lindon]] that others might kill him to pull his cycling technique from his [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] is mentioned regarding the depth of cores during advancement.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] Arelius uses [[soulfire]] to reinforce constructs.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] Arelius carries a blue umbrella of waxed fabric.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] Arelius is acting on behalf of [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] uses a folded umbrella as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] remarks that everything ends.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] is a person [[Yerin]] cannot catch up to.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] is expected at [[the Emperor]]'s audience hall.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The former Patriarch of the [[Akura clan]]'s [[Blackflame]] branch, Eithan Arelius, is a master of veils who possesses a strangely excellent foundation. While serving as [[Lindon]]'s master, he utilizes a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] and a [[void key]] to manage his belongings while teaching [[Lindon]] various techniques. Eithan, who has two apprentices including a young [[Blackflame]] contracted to a sacred turtle, guides [[Lindon]] toward natural treasure deposits and explains how a lack of [[soulfire]] can prevent potential Underlords from realizing their true revelations. During his time as a [[Skysworn]], he fulfills scouting duties and leads [[Lindon]] through a massive camp to reach [[Fisher Gesha]]. While navigating a cloudship alongside [[Naru Saeya]], he pours his [[madra]] into propulsion constructs and radiates power to delay approaching enemies.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] has a disciple who is described as a young [[Blackflame]] contracted to a sacred turtle.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is skilled in veils.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] reached out to lay a hand on [[Bai Rou]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] mentions that [[Skysworn]] require an assignment to complete squad registration.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] offers the choice of secret missions for the [[Empire]] or training to reach [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] possesses a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] uses a [[void key]] to store and retrieve items.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is the one who commissioned [[Lezaar]] to craft a specific pill.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] was ousted as Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] uses a scripted fire-starter to light his pipe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is teaching [[Lindon]] techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] wears [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] was the Patriarch for the [[Blackflame]] branch of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] leads a pack of young Truegolds in emerald armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is [[Lindon]]'s master.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] had a sixteen-step plan for perfecting [[Lindon]] as a [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] leads [[Lindon]] to unclaimed natural treasure deposits.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] told [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] that many potential Underlords fail to realize their true revelation because they lack enough [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] serves either the [[Arelius family]] or [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is duty-bound to a scouting mission given by the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is present during [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]]'s conversation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] Arelius has two apprentices.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] led [[Lindon]] through the massive camp outside the city walls to [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is a character who interacts with [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] intends to rob [[the Emperor]]'s vaults.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is expected to return with the [[Arelius technique library]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is a person [[Lindon]] fears losing.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] was chatting with [[Naru Saeya]] on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] and [[Naru Saeya]] were serving as navigators.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] is radiating power to slow the approach of enemies.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] was located near the propulsion constructs.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] was pouring his [[madra]] into the ship's propulsion constructs.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] Arelius built a strangely excellent foundation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|While competing in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, Eithan Arelius achieved perfect scores on all mental tests and advised [[Lindon]] to keep his [[Jade cycling technique]] a secret. Dressed in an intricate, many-layered red ensemble with gold star patterns, he faced [[Yerin]] in the [[Skysworn practice arena]] and was noted as a person capable of challenging both her and [[Naru Saeya]]. Throughout the competition, Eithan utilized [[pure madra]] to manifest blue-white [[Forged]] stars that dissipated back into [[aura]], eventually earning a tournament rank of sixty-fourth. As a member of the [[Blackflame team]] and a chosen of [[Akura Malice]], he worked on designing a flying fortress for the [[Ninecloud Soul]] and demonstrated his ability to redirect water madra. During combat, he was dissolved into white light only to emerge at the edge of a jungle, later appearing in gold-and-lavender outer robes while utilizing an [[Archlord sacred dagger]] and scissors that carry an [[Archlord binding]]. The cousin of [[Veris Arelius]], Eithan was also seen encountering a [[Monarch]] eating grilled vegetables in an alley within [[Ninecloud City]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is competing in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] warned [[Lindon]] to keep his [[Jade cycling technique]] a secret.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] Arelius has cores like deep lakes and a lifeline like a thousand-year ancestral tree.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] Arelius achieved perfect scores on all mental tests.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is [[Yerin]]'s opponent in the [[Skysworn practice arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] wears an intricate many-layered ensemble of red with patterns of gold stars.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] sensed [[Dross]]'s presence.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is a person in the city who can challenge [[Yerin]] or [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] spent his childhood learning how to restrict his physical senses.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] has a grin similar to [[Eithan]]'s.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] uses [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] can manifest blue-white stars of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] has [[Forged]] stars.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]]'s [[Forged]] stars dissipate back into [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wishes he were standing with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] has elaborately ornamented sleeves.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] Arelius is ranked sixty-fourth in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is designing a flying fortress for the [[Ninecloud Soul]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is part of the [[Blackflame team]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] redirected a stream of water madra.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] was dissolved into white light during the fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] emerged at the edge of the jungle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] uses an [[Archlord sacred dagger]] that can change its physical shape.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan's scissors]] carry an [[Archlord binding]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan's scissors]] respond well to [[Enforcement]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] wears gold-and-lavender outer robes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] waited in a booth for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] Arelius is of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and a chosen of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is [[Veris Arelius]]'s cousin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] finds the [[Monarch]] eating grilled vegetables in an alley in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] saluted the [[Ninecloud cleaning crew]] mentally.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] is not good at consolations.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Eithan Arelius, a member of the [[Arelius family]] and [[Lindon]]'s teacher, spent much of his [[life]] in the [[Blackflame Empire]] before participating in a competition under the protection of [[Malice]] and [[Northstrider]]. During the tournament, he competed for an [[Akura]] vassal team using techniques like the [[Hollow King's Crown]] and [[Empty Palm]], eventually advancing to the rank of [[Overlord]] through a process involving [[soulfire]]. After being eliminated from the matches, he traveled with [[Lindon]], [[Mercy]], and [[Fury]] into a pillar of darkness aboard one of the world's fastest cloudships. During combat, the [[Archlord]] utilized [[soulfire]] and [[madra]] to fight against blood [[aura]], employing the [[Hollow King's Mantle]] and [[Spear]] to defend his allies. Following a confrontation where he dove toward the group, Eithan was left bleeding on the floor of the cloudship dock.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was lounging in a padded chair in [[Lindon]]'s room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is [[Lindon]]'s teacher.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is participating in a competition and has been instructed to prepare to fight tomorrow morning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] has spent much of his [[life]] in the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] wears gray fighting robes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is a teacher who told his students he wouldn't hold back.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Hollow King's Crown]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] possesses a stopwatch device.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was under the protection of [[Malice]] and [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] suggests [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]] should join her if they can slip away from [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] insisted [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] meet at the restaurant.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] has not been seen by [[Lindon]] at any of the matches this week.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] wears bright ocean-shaded robes during the ceremony.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s signature would look the same as [[Mercy]]'s due to [[Akura Malice]]'s [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Watching [[Eithan]] fight has given [[Lindon]] thoughts about the direction he could take his own [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] gathered with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] at the end of the cloudship dock.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is a character who watched [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] has temporary access to the technique library.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s [[Overlord revelation]] is that he is one who sees.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses [[soulfire]] to refine and strengthen himself during advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s advancement to [[Overlord]] is less dramatic than the leap to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] provided perception training to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] told [[Yerin]] he does not see the [[Sage]] potential in her yet.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] Arelius uses cycling [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] intends to relay [[Lindon]]'s greetings to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s clothes were destroyed by destruction aura.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses a cloud condensed from [[aura]] around his waist.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a member of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] Arelius is competing in an [[Akura]] vassal team.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] offers to perform the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] for [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was eliminated from the matches.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] travels with [[Lindon]], [[Mercy]], and [[Fury]] into a pillar of darkness.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] has a cloudship that is one of the fastest in the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] spoke to [[Lindon]] about seeing himself as others saw him.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] may have extended his [[pure madra]] to cover the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] can drift down on a flow of wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is able to wave people aboard a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] gave [[Yerin]] [[dream tablets]] long ago.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s safety depends on [[Yerin]] winning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses pressure as a focused weapon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was at [[Lindon]]'s bedside when he woke up.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] questioned the ethics of whether a copy of [[Yerin]] is still [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is a character mentioned in relation to [[Malice]]'s plans.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] dove and rolled close to the group.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] launched a [[Hollow King]]’s [[Spear]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses [[soulfire]] and [[madra]] to fight against blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Hollow King’s Mantle]] to deflect a flying hawk of blood.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] lay on the floor bleeding with ragged breathing.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was on the cloudship dock with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|While traveling with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], Eithan Arelius—whose name signifies the embodiment of impossible perfection in his homeland—provided assurances to [[Lindon]] from a position below him. Dressed in a pink-and-purple outer robe, he monitored venomous presences and explained how [[Heralds]] focus their willpower inwardly. During their journey, he discovered clues in a ruined building and eventually transferred his [[Iron body]], [[Blackflame]] [[Path]], [[Jade cycling technique]], and contract with [[Orthos]] to [[Lindon]]. As a [[Sage]] who possesses [[Archlord soulfire]] resembling reflective chrome, Eithan completed the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] and traveled on a dark blue one-person cloud. After stealing a dream tablet from a [[labyrinth]], he later used his [[soulfire]] to heal himself and perform the Baptism on [[Ziel]]. Throughout these events, Eithan claimed to be a personal acolyte to the [[Sage of Twin Stars]] and a founding member of the [[Twin Star sect]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] gave [[Lindon]] assurances.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] might be able to teleport one day.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is located below [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] wears a pink-and-purple outer robe.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is traveling with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] owns a third of the [[island]] where [[Windfall]] is located.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] has a territory on the [[island]] that includes a single tree and a hut.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] timed the approach of the venomous presences.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] explains that [[Heralds]] focus their willpower inwardly to enhance their own power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is with the group.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] believes [[Elder Rahm]] has a soul of [[steel]] and will not provide information.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] found a clue while peering into the trees.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] noted the presence of grimy blankets and destroyed tools in a ruined building.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] addressed the [[Fallen Leaf School]] as brothers and sisters.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] gave [[Lindon]] his [[Iron body]], [[Blackflame]] [[Path]], [[Jade cycling technique]], and contract with [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] uses a green goop healing salve.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] notes that [[Sages]] can accomplish with authority whatever they could accomplish without it.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] volunteered to secure Heaven’s Glory.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] completed the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] Arelius travels on a dark blue one-person cloud.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] Arelius's name means 'embodiment of impossible perfection' in his homeland.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] possesses [[Archlord soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]]'s [[soulfire]] is a dense flame of reflective chrome, like quicksilver imitating fire.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] was sent a message to prepare for the [[Wei clan]]'s arrival.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] feigned offense when addressed by [[Elder Rahm]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] wears a turquoise outer robe.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] stole a dream tablet from the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] lost his [[Golds]] at an inopportune moment.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] has finite [[madra]] reserves.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is expected to join [[Lindon]] soon.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is staying in his house on the [[island]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is an outsider to [[Lindon]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] strode out of the messy blue light.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] uses [[aura]] control to fly through the air.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] used his [[soulfire]] to heal himself and perform the Baptism on [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] Arelius claims to be a founding member of the [[Twin Star sect]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] Arelius claims to be a personal acolyte to the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|An [[Archlord]] and the figurehead of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]], Eithan Arelius—also known as the [[Uncrowned Queen]]—initially hesitated before finding excitement in moving to the [[Blackflame Empire]]. Despite being stuck at the [[Underlord]] stage for many years, this genius [[Soulsmith]] provided advice to the fleet and entered a [[labyrinth]] alongside [[Lindon]], where he suspected the structure had been intentionally modified. During his journey, Eithan utilized various techniques and weapons like the [[Hollow Spear]] to combat threats, even as he fought to avoid manifesting the same [[Icons]] as [[Ozmanthus]]. He eventually revealed his true identity as [[Ozmanthus]] [[Tiberian]] Mereithan Arelius, a member of the [[Abidan]] formerly known as [[Ozriel]] who possessed the power of the [[Reaper]]. Having abandoned his cosmic mission to put down dying worlds in order to raise up successors, he was seen as a peer to [[Sages]] and [[Heralds]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] does not feel [[Eithan]]'s presence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is an [[Archlord]] and the figurehead of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] initially objected to moving to the [[Blackflame Empire]] but then found the idea exciting.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] intends to fulfill his obligation to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is referred to as the [[Uncrowned Queen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] kicked [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a character mentioned by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is a character who provides advice to the fleet.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has been stuck at [[Underlord]] for many years.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a potential hostage to force [[Yerin Arelius]]'s cooperation.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] can manifest a ball of [[madra]] between his fingers.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has short hair.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] normally changes his clothes at least twice a day.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is an [[Archlord]] with no dream abilities.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] grabbed [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] believes someone modified the [[labyrinth]]'s function with intention.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] threw an arm around [[Lindon]] and walked with him into the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] possesses a marble that contains darkness.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] cleared his throat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is weak against [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is weak against fine imported silk.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is a genius [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is looking into the darkness.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] indicated that the chamber is a way through.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] expected to sense [[Eithan]] in the area.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] uses concentrated [[Striker techniques]] to eradicate [[hunger madra]] strands.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] wears fine pink-and-blue silks.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] uses the [[Hollow Spear]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] can drop stars of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] blasted a trident from the air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] appeared in front of [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] projected the [[Hollow Spear]] technique from his scissors.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]]'s armor is dissolving.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has [[Icons]] that almost formed during his fight with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|If manifested fully, [[Eithan]]'s [[Icons]] would have made him a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is waiting for the [[Joy Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] does not want to manifest the same [[Icons]] as [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] paced back and forth in the hallway.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] called back regarding the exit opening.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] theorized that the [[labyrinth]] could not lock them in.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] notes the presence of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] and [[Dreadgod cults]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] can be consumed to borrow his bloodline legacy.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is a peer to [[Sages]] and [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a character mentioned by [[Kahn Mala]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is restricted by oath.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was walking with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] can move at [[Archlord]] speed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] saw a shadow of himself ascending to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] spoke wistfully about the majesty of soul oaths.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] reveals he has been holding a black marble.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] possesses the power of the [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has the vision of the [[Hound]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was once declared the heir of the [[Spider]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]]'s strength has faded due to staying under the [[Origin Shroud]] for a long time.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]]'s full name is [[Ozmanthus]] [[Tiberian]] Mereithan Arelius.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]]'s mother called him [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was once [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] stopped a cosmic attack with the palm of his hand.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] is a member of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius was seen in a vision within [[Eithan's marble]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius's role in the cosmos was to put down worlds that were too sick to go on.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] Arelius abandoned his mission to attempt to raise up people who could replace him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] identified the figure she saw as [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Residing in a sparsely furnished hut on [[Windfall]] where he left a bottle intended for [[Lindon]]'s hair, Eithan has undergone a forced ascension. After ascending into the heavens to tend his garden, he demonstrated world-shaking power before vanishing, eventually revealing himself as a heavenly messenger and the figure known as [[Ozmanthus]]. As a prominent and powerful member of the [[Abidan]], he fought a mysterious enemy in the sky and blinded [[Malice]]'s ability to see into the future. His actions, which included liberating a [[Soulforge]] from [[Reigan Shen]] and leaving scales for [[Little Blue]], have brought chaos to the world and caused concern for [[Malice]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]]'s house on [[Windfall]] is minimal and sparsely furnished.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] left a bottle labeled 'For [[Lindon]]’s hair' in his hut.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] has undergone a forced ascension.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has spent time with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] has ascended into the heavens.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] has a garden.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] demonstrated world-shaking power and then vanished.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] Arelius is the same person as [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] revealed himself as a heavenly messenger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ziel]] attempts to act like [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] left scales behind for [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a prominent and powerful figure among the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]]'s plans are a concern to [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] fought a mysterious enemy in the sky.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] is mentioned by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] is someone [[Lindon]] compares [[Dross]]'s comments to.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] thinks [[Eithan]] might be able to hear [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] noted that the [[Titan]] is known for its inevitability rather than its speed.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] Arelius blinded [[Malice]]'s ability to look into the future.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] Arelius has ascended.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] liberated a [[Soulforge]] from [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Larian]]'s grin makes her look uncomfortably like [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Eithan]] Arelius has brought chaos to the world.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Known as the [[Reaper of Worlds]], Eithan is a [[Judge]] and celestial executioner who once reached the height of his [[Path]] through his original eighth opening. During a simulation involving an [[Overlord]]-level projection, he demonstrated his immense power by defeating a veiled [[Monarch]] in nine seconds and using spoons to manipulate a [[Hollow Domain]]. Though he has been seen erasing stars and performing absolute, cold strikes, his recent brush with death has left him from his peak condition. While [[Lindon]] worried the [[Abidan]] might have imprisoned him, Eithan sent [[Fury]] to his companion and continues to view [[Lindon]]'s home as his own.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The eighth opening was [[Eithan]]'s original creation and represented the height of his [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] wished he had known who [[Eithan]] was.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] Arelius left his apprentice a weapon capable of killing [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]]'s echo might be tapping into the [[labyrinth]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] has used black armor in battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]]'s attacks are described as clean, cold, and absolute.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] has apprentices.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] noted that [[Ozmanthus]] was still [[Eithan]] in many ways.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a blonde, smiling, well-dressed opponent.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] used spoons to slash open [[Little Blue]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] and nudge [[Orthos]] off-course.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The battle between [[Orthos]] and [[Eithan]] was a simulation.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] has been seen erasing stars.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The projection of [[Eithan]] is from when he was at [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] defeated a veiled [[Monarch]] in nine seconds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] created a cave thousands of years ago.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] mentioned [[Eithan]] to the [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is mentioned as someone the [[Oracle Sage]] compares others to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] once adopted [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] helped [[Cladia]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] rose to defend the world from a black sky event.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] attributes [[Yerin]]'s arrogance to [[Eithan]]'s influence.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has a memory of [[Eithan]] in black armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a person who has had recent experience dodging shots from [[Tal’gullour]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a person [[Ozriel]] wants to be.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is the [[Reaper of Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] performs absolute strikes against enemies in the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is associated with an attack [[Yerin]] has been working on.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] intends to get [[Eithan]] to fix the portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a person [[Yerin]] knows who has the ability to wipe out stars.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is not in his peak condition due to a recent brush with death.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is not on the other side of the rift [[Lindon]] opened.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] worried that [[Eithan]] might have been imprisoned by the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] sent [[Fury]] to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is a celestial executioner.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] has white hair and wears black armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] considers [[Lindon]]'s home to be his own.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|While navigating the [[labyrinth]] with his adopted brother [[Lindon]], Eithan Arelius carries the heavy emotions of [[Ozmanthus]] within a body that is blood-caked and bruised. Having previously released [[Yan Shoumei]] from [[Sky's Edge]], the [[Abidan]] superior known for his divine skill and combat experience against a star-blotting foe undergoes a transformation into [[Ozriel]], appearing with pure white hair and sleek black armor. During their time together, he assists [[Lindon]] in remodeling the interior of the [[Grave]] and advises him on the creation process after revealing his own fragment was a featureless glob of elemental matter. Despite claiming to be the greatest craftsman in all the worlds and possessing the ability to tear sapphire holes through the [[Way]], Eithan's efforts are complicated by [[Gadrael]]'s interference and his own critiques regarding the materials used for [[Lindon]]'s bow.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] is currently in the [[labyrinth]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] carries the anger, sadness, and pride that [[Ozmanthus]] carried.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]]'s body is broken, bruised, and blood-caked.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] Arelius let [[Yan Shoumei]] go from [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] Arelius holds a title related to divine skill.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] Arelius has fought a man who blotted out the stars.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] is [[Mercy]]'s superior in the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] believes he will give [[Mercy]] the [[Silent King]]'s bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] complained about the lack of materials [[Lindon]] used for his bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] could resolve the problem in seconds.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]]'s hair is pure white instead of blond.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] wears sleek, black armor from the neck down.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] is now [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]]'s actions prevent [[Lindon]] from reaching [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] believes a victory by [[Lindon]] would cause the [[Vroshir]] to withdraw.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] has white hair.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] remodeled the interior of the [[Grave]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] claims to be the greatest craftsman in all the worlds.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] can tear open a sapphire hole in reality to travel through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]]'s fragment was a featureless glob containing water, earth, and microscopic [[life]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] advised [[Lindon]] to let the [[Way]] handle the rest of the creation process.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] Arelius's name ends in '-iel'.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] is [[Lindon]]'s adopted brother.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“Forgiveness, elder brother, but I don't—”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“Remember my thousand eyes,” Eithan said.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|He watched like Lindon's mother examining a new breed of Remnant. "A flawless transition to Iron. Amazing."<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“He’s a gamble, I’ll admit. But if it pays off, then I’m more worried about you keeping up with him.”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"The Arelius family is a wide tree, my young adopted brother, with many roots."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
